summary: Decent recording with an experimental Dan Healy mix and a trippy "The Other One" as the highlight.
review: The sole review praises the unusual sound treatment applied by Dan Healy, noting how it blends with Bob Weir’s vocals to create a “pretty cool effect.” The performance of "The Other One" is singled out as especially trippy, though no concrete details about overall mix clarity or source are provided, leaving the recording quality ambiguous.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review; it highlights a strong moment in the show but offers no clear assessment of recording fidelity, resulting in an overall average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions Dan Healy’s experimental sound treatment; no explicit comments on clarity, balance or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on overall set structure; only the trippy "Other One" is noted as a highlight.

band_member_comments.Bob: Voice highlighted in the experimental mix, described as part of a cool effect.
